description: Dimension table configuration for providers - BIS-style

dimension_tables.sql_script: SELECT DISTINCT ch."BillingProviderNPI" as npi, ch."BillingProviderTIN" as tin, ch."BillingProviderLastOrOrg" as lastName, ch."BillingProviderFirstName" as firstName, ch."BillingProviderMiddleName" as middleName, ch."BillingProviderAddressLine1" as address1, ch."BillingProviderAddressLine2" as address2, ch."BillingProviderCity" as city, ch."BillingProviderState" as state, ch."BillingProviderZip" as zipCode, CURRENT_DATE as effectiveStartDate, NULL as effectiveEndDate, 1 as isCurrent FROM claim_headers ch WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' AND ch."BillingProviderNPI" IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT ch."RenderingProviderNPI" as npi, NULL as tin, ch."RenderingProviderLastName" as lastName, ch."RenderingProviderFirstName" as firstName, ch."RenderingProviderMiddleName" as middleName, NULL as address1, NULL as address2, NULL as city, NULL as state, NULL as zipCode, CURRENT_DATE as effectiveStartDate, NULL as effectiveEndDate, 1 as isCurrent FROM claim_headers ch WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' AND ch."RenderingProviderNPI" IS NOT NULL
